_comment: exp_025 — pass-4 stage-1 + exp_018/exp_014 rescue stack. SINGLE-variable swap from exp_018: source_experiment exp_017_pass2_stage1 → exp_024_pass4_stage1. Rescue model_id, rescue prompts, all token budgets, and vLLM sizing are IDENTICAL to exp_018 (the +0.042 rescue config, stronger than exp_021's +0.025). Tests whether pass-4's +1.4pp stage-1 board gain (0.586 → 0.600) compounds with the proven rescue stack. Current best to beat: exp_018 = 0.628. Target: must clear 0.628 convincingly (not by a hair) given pass-4 stage-1 was only ~0.6σ over the floor.

rescue._model_id_note: Kept as the exp_009 GRPO strict70 rescuer (NOT pass-4), identical to exp_018, to isolate the change to stage-1 only. exp_014 lesson: this rescuer lifts MCQ but is saturated on free-form. Swapping the rescuer to pass-4 would mix two variables — do that as a follow-up only if exp_025 wins.

notes: Identical to exp_018 except source_experiment + stage1_dataset_name. Same rescue prompts, same rescuer model, same token budget, same vLLM sizing. Cheapest test of whether pass-4's stage-1 board gain compounds with the existing rescue stack.
